mapper.sql: id, user_id, evaluation_report, probation_period_start, probation_period_end, status, reviewer_id, reviewed_at, comments
mapper.select: SELECT FROM prepare_member_application WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM prepare_member_application ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prepare_member_application (user_id, evaluation_report, probation_period_start, probation_period_end, status, reviewer_id, reviewed_at, comments) VALUES (#{userId}, #{evaluationReport}, #{probationPeriodStart}, #{probationPeriodEnd}, #{status}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewedAt}, #{comments})
mapper.update: UPDATE prepare_member_application SET evaluation_report = #{evaluationReport}, probation_period_start = #{probationPeriodStart}, probation_period_end = #{probationPeriodEnd}, status = #{status}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, comments = #{comments} WHERE id = #{id}
